project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with Tailwind CSS, financial calculators
verification_instructions: Run 'npx next build' to verify no type errors or build failures. Run 'npx next lint' for lint check.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full network access available. No Docker needed - direct npm/next.js build on host.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Standard Next.js conventions apply.
key_patterns: 1) CANONICAL_DOMAIN in lib/seo-utils.ts is the single source of truth for domain, but many pages hardcode the staging URL in canonical alternates. 2) CalculatorSchemaInjector component adds SoftwareApplication + FAQPage schema - currently only on 3 pages (loan-calculator, investment-calculator, salary-calculator). 3) Most calculator pages use JsonLd + getCalculatorSchema which only adds SoftwareApplication. 4) Blog how-to and ultimate-guide pages use BlogLayout component which injects BlogPosting schema automatically. 5) Editorial blog posts (sip-vs-lumpsum, new-vs-old-tax-regime, etc.) do NOT use BlogLayout and have zero schema. 6) openGraph is defined on ~20 pages; 127+ pages are missing OG tags. 7) robots.ts and sitemap.ts both hardcode the staging URL instead of using CANONICAL_DOMAIN.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router pages; app/in/ - India-specific calculators; app/blog/ - all blog content; app/blog/how-to-use-* and app/blog/ultimate-guide-* use BlogLayout component; app/blog/sip-vs-lumpsum etc are editorial; components/seo/ - SEO components; lib/seo-utils.ts - schema utilities and CANONICAL_DOMAIN constant
